scripts.dev: npm run dev:react & npm run dev:electron
scripts.dev:electron: npm run transpile:electron && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --no-sandbox
scripts.dist:mac: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:win32: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --win --x86
scripts.dist:linux: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.dist:linux32: npm run transpile:electron && npm run build && electron-builder --linux --x86
